common.unverified: Please verify your account first before you use this feature.

errors.too_many_requests: Too many requests! Please try again later.

connection.failed: Connection to the selected server failed.

downloadClient.title: Get Amber for Windows
downloadClient.description: Keep Amber close with the desktop client - faster launches, better focus, and no browser tab required.
downloadClient.note: The latest build opens from the official GitHub release.

login.title: Login into your account
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials below to login

recovery.title: Recover your password
recovery.description: You can make a request every 30 minutes.
recovery.invalid_code: The code you entered either expired or is invalid.
recovery.locked: Password recovery is temporarily locked. Please try again later.
recovery.too_soon: You can request a password change every 30 minutes.
recovery.too_late: The code you used already expired. Request a new password change.
recovery.sent: The recovery code has been sent to your email. Please check your inbox (spam too!)
recovery.success: You've succesfully changed your password. Please log in.

register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Enter your info below to create your account
register.usernameHint: Only letters and numbers are allowed.
register.emailHint: We'll use this to verify you
register.passwordHint: Password must be at least 8 characters
register.terms: Before clicking continue, you must agree to our <terms>terms & conditions</terms> and <privacy>privacy policy</privacy>.
register.invalidUsername: Invalid username. Must contain no spaces or special characters. Maximum length is 16.
register.invalidPassword: Invalid password. Must be at least 8 characters long, have at least one lowercase letter, one uppercase letter and one digit.
register.invalidName: Your display name cannot be more than 32 characters!
register.invalidEmail: Invalid email format. Please use a valid email address.

verify.title: Verify Your Account

description.step_one: We'll send an email with a verification code.
description.step_two: Please enter the code we sent to your email.

verify.too_soon: A verification email has been already sent. Retry in 30 minutes.
verify.email_sent: A verification email has been sent. Please check your inbox (spam too!)
verify.invalid_code: The code you provided is invalid
verify.too_late: Your verification code has already expired, please retry.
verify.locked: Your account is temporarily locked due to too many failed attempts. Please try again later.
verify.success: Your account is verified. It might take a moment to update.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.description: Please review the terms and conditions before using Amber.
terms.content:
1. Acceptance of Terms
By creating an account and accessing Amber, you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree to any part of these terms, you may not use the service.

2. User Responsibilities
You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to use Amber only for lawful purposes and in a way that does not infringe on the rights of others.

3. User Conduct
You agree not to harass, threaten, or harm other users. Abusive, offensive, or inappropriate content is strictly prohibited. Any violation may result in account suspension or termination without notice.

4. Service Modifications
We reserve the right to modify or discontinue Amber, in whole or in part, at any time without notice. We shall not be liable for any modification, suspension, or discontinuance of the service.

5. Limitation of Liability
To the fullest extent permitted by law, Amber and its creators are not liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use or inability to use the service.

6. Changes to Terms
We may update these terms at any time. Your continued use of Amber following any changes constitutes your acceptance of the new terms. We encourage you to review this agreement periodically.

7. Termination
We reserve the right to terminate or suspend your account at any time for violations of these terms or for any reason deemed necessary to protect the integrity of our service.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Please review how Amber handles and protects your data.
privacy.content: We collect only the information needed to run Amber, such as account details and usage data required for core features. We protect your data and do not sell personal information.

tray.title: Minimize to tray
tray.description: When disabled, closing the app will quit instead of hiding it.

startOnBoot.title: Start on boot
startOnBoot.description: Launch Amber automatically when you sign in.

microphone.title: Microphone
microphone.description: Select the default microphone for calls.

camera.title: Camera
camera.description: Select the default camera for calls.

speaker.title: Speaker
speaker.description: Select the default speaker for calls.

help.title: Help
help.description: Found an issue or need help with something?

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: This changes the entire application theme.

scaling.title: Scaling
scaling.description: Fit more content on your screen.
scaling.label: Scaling

details.title: Account details
details.description: Your public profile and login identity.

signOut.title: Sign out
signOut.description: Are you sure you want to sign out? You'll be redirected to the login page.

delete.title: Delete Account
delete.description: Permanently erases all of your data. This action can not be reversed by support.

data.title: Request Personal Data
data.description: Request all the data we have about you
data.too_soon: You can request your data every week.
data.toast: Your requested data has been sent to your email. Please check your inbox (spam too!)

password.title: Change Password
password.description: Modify your password. Remember, you have to use at least a lower-case and an upper-case character, a number and a special character.

email.title: Change Email
email.description: Change your account's email. Make sure it is valid.
email.request_description: Enter your new email and password. We'll send you verification codes to confirm and finish the change.
email.confirm_description: Enter the confirmation code sent to your current email to continue.
email.verify_description: Enter the verification code sent to: {{email}}
email.same: You can't change your email to your current one.
email.no_pending: There is no pending email change request.
email.not_confirmed: The email change has not been confirmed yet.
email.already_confirmed: The email change has already been confirmed.
email.too_late: Your verification code has expired. Please start again.
email.locked: Email changes are temporarily locked due to too many failed attempts. Please try again later.
email.too_soon: You can request a new email change every half an hour.
email.verify_sent: A verification code has been sent to your email. Please check your inbox (spam too!)

name.title: Change Display Name
name.description: This action is available only once every week.
name.same: Can't update full name to your current one.
name.updated: Successfully updated your full name. Next change available in a week.
name.tooSoon: You've reached your change limit. You'll be able to modify your name in <time>{{days}}</time> days.

manage.title: Manage account details
manage.description: Update your display name, email, and password from one place.

avatar.error: Failed to upload avatar. Please try again.

confirm.title: Upload Avatar
confirm.description: Are you sure you want to use this image as your avatar?

contacts.title: Chats
contacts.yourself: You cannot perform this action on yourself.
contacts.not_added: {{user}} is not in your contacts list.
contacts.already_requested: There is already a request sent or received from {{user}}.
contacts.requested: Success! Your request to befriend {{user}} has been sent.
contacts.no_request: You did not send a request to {{user}}.

removeConfirm.title: Remove Contact
removeConfirm.description: Are you sure you want to remove {{user}} from your contacts?

blockConfirm.title: Block Contact
blockConfirm.description: Are you sure you want to block {{user}}? You won't be able to chat with them and they won't be able to contact you.

add.title: Add Friends
add.description: You can add friends with their Amber username.

requests.title: Requests
requests.description: Accept or decline any friendship requests you've received.
requests.none: No requests received at the moment.

blocked.unreachable: This user is unreachable. Check if you've blocked them.
blocked.title: Blocked contacts

verify.notice: Verify your account to unlock full features.

conversation.title: Start a conversation
conversation.get_started_description: Three quick steps to begin your first conversation.
conversation.add_contacts_hint: Open the add-contact flow to invite someone by username.
conversation.select_hint: Choose a contact from the sidebar to open the chat.
conversation.message_hint: Type your message and send it when you're ready.

confirm.title: Delete Message
confirm.description: Are you sure you want to delete this message? This action cannot be undone.

error.not_participating: You are not participating in this conversation.
error.too_long: The message can not exceed 2048 characters.
error.invalid_message: An error occured and we couldn't find the message data. Try again later!
error.no_permission: You do not have permission to do that!
error.no_relation: You are not friends with this users or they've blocked you.

outgoing.waiting: Waiting for the other person to answer...
